AC: 25
CHA: +7 WIS: +10 AGI: +7 MANA: +10
WT: 15.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except MNK NEC WIZ MAG ENC BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Crystal Chitin Chestguard
Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 25
CHA: +7 WIS: +10 AGI: +7 MANA: +10
WT: 15.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except MNK NEC WIZ MAG ENC BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Velious Plate 2
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Tribute:1640
Submitted By:Thaniell Moonhowler
Lucy Entry By:lowkey
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-02 11:43:21
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 60,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 41
[Drops | Comments ]

Uploaded November 5th, 2024 by iventheassassin

« Previous 1 2 3 Next »
Post Comment
Cash-worthy
QuoteReply
# Jan 11 2007 at 2:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591903361531
63 posts
These seem to sell for alot on my server also other servers i have alts on.
I hail from Maelin, Bertox, and Tribunal. And on all 3 of my servers, i see them never under 50k. And run up to 200k.

I believe its mainly because its platemail a druid can wear. Not so much rarity. But platemail druid equipable. I prefer Noble Djorn tho hehe. wiz/nec/mage/enc in full no-drop platemail > Druid in full droppable platemail.

The stats are nice. But if you are looking for stats for twinks.
Lord Inquisitor Sseru/Matchless from WW Dragons can't be topped.

plate

Druid in Plate
QuoteReply
# May 25 2003 at 1:45 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591789532778
4 posts
Aye, I was a druid wearing a full set (graphic) Chest, legs, and arm of the Brown Chitin Type and Dyed it White, It look Pearlized I was so Uber (in my mind) ever one thought I was a Ranger cause i was useing a Bone Handelede Scimitar wich looks like a Black Acrylia Scimitar. I loved it then when for what was more WIS efficient, /sigh Acrylia Studded LOL so now im wearinf leather again.

GL to all you druids out there that want to not be the typical druid.

Catherine
Furter Ubah Druidess

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 04 2002 at 9:54 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) What are you gummibear, some kind of freekin tard?
Wanna blow some minds?
QuoteReply
# Aug 04 2002 at 6:08 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591754860522
7 posts
Full set of CC stuff, a parrying dagger, forged ******* sword, and a square helm really throw people for a loop.

Here, this steel-clad female woodelf wielding what looks like rogue weapons buffs, sows, then ports away before anyone can say anything or inspect.

I have actually got petitioned once for exploiting when I didn't reveal my class. The gm laughed when he showed up, so I 'swatted' him with pottery sketches. It was sweet =P

I pretty much don't care about getting the 'biggest and baddest' equipment in the game. I love to have fun, and a druid in FULL plate with non-druid weapons in hand is hilarious!

I think I'm the only druid on Lanys decked out this way. I haven't seen anyone else. They all went for their velious stuff. I'm unique by being the only shiny druid on Lanys =D

QuoteReply
# May 28 2002 at 9:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777172369
8 posts
I am not getting into the comparison game but my druid has a full set off cc for one reason only. Looks.

I have all the good stuff in bags so I can put it when I do heavy fighting but most of the time when you are goofing off or just in some easy xp group, it really doesnt matter. I hit 245 wis with full cc (and hammerfal bracer) with 950+ ac and around 1800hp. If thats not good enough to go kill stuff then man, you really are splitting hairs.

▲ Page top
Rare?
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2002 at 1:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1674432996709
15 posts
Who cares if its rare. Any druid out there concerned with acquiring status symbols should go pick a new class anyways because there are few good looking attainable chest pieces out there (and I mean like 5). Lets look at the facts.

AC 25: Nice! But really of marginal importance in the field, druids are not supposed to get hit.
Cha +7 *cough* You won't spend much time trying to charm animals for exp, don't worry about it.
Agi +7: This is good because it helps with defense in general, fairly important. (see above)
Wis +10: Bingo there's the money shot. 10 is quite high, helps you maintain 200 and get resists at the same time, this is the most important feature, duh.
Mana 10: Hrm, nuff said.

This BP is worth 10k. It certainly pushes the planer BP Wis envelope and has nicely rounded stats. Look at some of the better non-planar BP's and CLICK on the pricing data to see the individual posts and I think you will agree that 10k is fair atm. Don't get all googlie eyed over this stuff as a low level druid, it takes severe time investments to get gear of this quality (saving to buy it or grouping to get it), don't even ask about 55+ spell buying... peace.

P.S. I still go anon, grab my sap of piety and all my leather looking gear, and run around looking like a lvl 9 saying I don't have sow yet when they ask and then they shoe me away.
▲ Page top
10k?

▲ Page top
CC CG is best for druid
QuoteReply
# Dec 27 2001 at 11:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768562236
5 posts
My friend has this... hes a level 60 druid on Tarew Marr - its probably the best non quest druid chestplate there is...It can definitly compete with ES BP and therefore on our server at least would sell for at least 80k... Reason being it is just so damn rare that there are like 4 on the server- looks like Thurgadin Warrior Wood Elf quest armor or Thurgadin Bard quest armor...Very nice on druid - makes him look like a wood elf warrior/bard... All other classes that would use (cleric, shaman) can all have BETTER by the time they are even able to get this - there is without a doubt no better droppable druid bp - look what druids have - Treeweave, Foremans Tunic, Ulkhork Tunic, Fungi tunic (which he wore before this), this BP is a definite until Skyshrine/Kael BP.
▲ Page top
RE: CC CG is best for druid
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2002 at 3:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791883973
33 posts
Sell for 80k? Um, no.

My main server is Tarew Marr, and my druid has been known to be a bit of an auction-ho (spending weeks at a time in EC, before going back to levelling). ES BP goes for under 20k on Tarew Marr (though I've seen it go for twice that...), and the Crystal Chitin Chestguard goes for under 10k. Only 4 on the server? Tarew Marr is one of the most heavily-farmed servers out there, and I've seen more than 4 for sale at one time. Rarely a day goes by that I'm running through EC that I don't see one of these for sale. Best for druid? By the time you can afford it, you're better off with planar gear/quest gear.
▲ Page top
RE: CC CG is best for druid
QuoteReply
